title: Detailed Enchantments
body:
Detailed Enchantments is a mod inspired by [Enchantment Descriptions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantment-descriptions) that aims to improve and visualize Minecraft enchantment process

 

Enchantment Screen
![Enchantment Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03567aa97ee7202a77df517e3af51d06a39bc41a.png)

Item Tooltip (Shift for info by default)

![Item Enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74ab574e99cc61c304062b76377ab172d64b31ed.png)
 
Configuration & Customization

It is very easy to add new descriptions or modify existing ones. This mod works the same as [Enchantment Descriptions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchantment-descriptions)

 ![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db7229af8b3cdc3dfbbb97d2341f087da1d6db42_0.webp)
